calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-08-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Apr-12-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Linda Chavez.
Jerry Threet, Deputy City Attorney and Certified Law Student: Evan Kuluk for Plaintiff: City and County of San Francisco.
Plaintiff's Witness: Mohammed Nuru, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Wilfredo Amaya.
Total Money Judgment of $83,173.32
Counsel to prepare Judgment for signature.

P.M.
Proposed Judgement rec'd, granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan.
See scanned doc. for details of the Judgment.
